focus: Decision guidance — template selection, CSS vs shader transitions, render config

tasks.instruction: Create a 15-second 1920x1080 data visualization video showing quarterly revenue growth across 4 quarters. Animated bar chart with labels and a title card.
tasks.input_data: Q1: $1.2M, Q2: $1.8M, Q3: $2.5M, Q4: $3.9M. Colors: dark bg (#0f0f23), amber accent (#ffb347), white text.
tasks.expected_outcome: Agent selects an appropriate template for animated data (e.g., swiss-grid or decision-tree), builds chart bars with GSAP stagger, runs full pipeline.
tasks.success_criteria: Template is appropriate for data visualization. GSAP stagger used for bar entrance. lint passes. render produces a non-black video.

tasks.instruction: Create a 20-second 1920x1080 high-energy sports promo video for 'Apex Athletics'. Needs dramatic transitions between 3 segments: intro (0-5s), athlete showcase (5-12s), CTA (12-20s).
tasks.input_data: brand colors: black bg (#000), red accent (#e63946), white text (#fff). Font: Impact/Arial bold.
tasks.expected_outcome: Agent selects shader transitions (appropriate for 'high' energy) and uses high-energy entrance animations. Render output has visible transitions between scenes.
tasks.success_criteria: Transition type matches skill's mood/energy table (high = shader: ridged burn, glitch, chromatic split). 3 scenes with entrance animations. No exit animations except final scene. lint passes.

tasks.instruction: Create a 25-second 1920x1080 brand video for 'Montcastle Tech'. This is a client deliverable that needs to be byte-identical across re-renders. Single scene with animated logo + 3 product feature cards.
tasks.input_data: Brand: dark navy/teal (#0d1b2a/#1b4965), white text. Font: Inter.
tasks.expected_outcome: Agent produces the composition and renders with --docker flag for reproducibility, --quality high for final delivery.
tasks.success_criteria: --docker flag used in render command for reproducibility. --quality high or --output set. lint passes. Duration matches spec. Docker render completes.
